demographics.audit_notes: Corrected total_population from 450 to 2959 and household_count from 160 to 1055 based on 1990 Decennial Census for Tract 17.11. Original values were implausibly low for the tract, suggesting a misunderstanding of the neighborhood's initial size. This correction establishes a proper baseline for the decade.
Re-interpolated population and household count based on corrected 1990 and 2000 Census anchor points. Original values reflected an incorrect growth trajectory.
